items.text:
<font color="#FF0000">GET</font> + <font color="#0000FF">SIFAT</font> → My son <font color="#FF0000">got</font> <font color="#0000FF">big</font>.
<font color="#FF0000">MAKE</font> + <font color="#00FF00">SOMEONE</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">SIFAT</font> → You <font color="#FF0000">made</font> <font color="#00FF00">me</font> <font color="#00FFFF">angry</font>.
<font color="#FF0000">MAKE</font> + <font color="#A020F0">SOMETHING</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">SIFAT</font> → Inflation <font color="#FF0000">makes</font> <font color="#A020F0">prices</font> <font color="#00FFFF">more expensive</font>.

<font color="#FF0000">Get</font> + <font color="#A020F0">something</font> + <font color="#00FF00">V3</font> → Ayşe <font color="#FF0000">got</font> <font color="#A020F0">her hair</font> <font color="#00FF00">done</font>.
<font color="#FF0000">Have</font> + <font color="#A020F0">something</font> + <font color="#00FF00">V3</font> → I <font color="#FF0000">had</font> <font color="#A020F0">my car</font> <font color="#00FF00">fixed</font>.

<font color="#FF0000">Get</font> + <font color="#00FF00">someone</font> + <font color="#A020F0">V1</font> → Ayşe <font color="#FF0000">got</font> <font color="#00FF00">hairdresser</font> <font color="#A020F0">do</font> her hair.
<font color="#FF0000">Have</font> + <font color="#00FF00">someone</font> + <font color="#A020F0">V1</font> → I <font color="#FF0000">had</font> <font color="#00FF00">the dentist</font> <font color="#A020F0">pull</font> my tooth.

<font color="#FF0000">Make</font> + <font color="#00FF00">someone</font> + <font color="#A020F0">V1</font> → I <font color="#FF0000">made</font> <font color="#00FF00">my grandfather</font> <font color="#A020F0">take</font> his medicine.
